gazette: Official Gazette dated 02 April 2024 and numbered 32508
title: Dumping investigation initiated for " hot-rolled flat steel" (thick plate) originating in the Republic of Korea
bodyHtml:
A dumping investigation has been initiated for " hot-rolled flat steel" (thick plate) products originating in the Republic of Korea. The merchandise covered by the scope of the investigation is classified under the customs tariff positions of 7208.51, 7208.52, 7225.99, and 7208.90.80, as well as under the customs statistical positions of 7211.13.00.11.00, 7211.13.00.19.00, 7211.14.00.21.11, 7211.14.00.21.12, 7211.14.00.29.11, 7211.14.00.29.12, 7211.14.00.31.00, 7211.14.00.39.00, 7211.19.00.21.00, 7211.19.00.29.00, 7225.40.40.00.00, and 7225.40.60.00.00.

Concerned parties are required to submit their responses to the questionnaire and their opinions regarding the investigation within a period of 37 days.

Please click here for the Notification on Prevention of Unfair Competition in Imports (No: 2024/14).
